title: Two Become One
description: A modpack that aims to strengthen bonds between friends. Fighting Bosses, completing quest, and more!
body:
![Stand alone Logo without the background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c241d251e8b3b9e1df4f67a1f7b4c26af8b9724b.png)
## Welcome to the tale, of **Two become One**.

**What is this modpack?**

This modpack aims to strengthen the bonds between Two people. It is a tale as old as time, friendship that is. It is what helps us through the dark times and makes the good times better. This pack aims to allow Two friends to become even stronger together.

## **This pack includes:**

- 24 Different and Unique Bosses and their respective content.
- A thrilling narrative that is completely written by the player. Although it does have a definitive ending.
- Overhauled Terrain Generation with Hundreds of structures to explore and loot.
- Hundreds of blocks to help make your house a home.
- Essentials Installed for seamless Co-op gameplay. So no need to pay for servers!
- Better Combat + Combat Roll for a cleaner combat feel.
- Complete rework of the Leveling system with PlayerEx.
- Overhaul of the Mob Combat system to provide compatability with Better Combat.
- Farmers Delight to fix your food needs.
- Progressive Difficulty for those who love a challenge.
- Magic and Magic School Leveling with WizardEx.
- Tiered Loot drops and craftables using TieredZ.

## **What is to come:**

- Fantasy Weapons Resource Pack to customize your Vanilla Weapons.
- Using the Fantasy Wespons Resource pack, creating 60+ New Weapons to craft.

## **Some stuff to remember:**

- Make sure when you create your worlds to have Cheats Enabled!
- Make sure to turn off PvP when you enter your world, you are there to help eachother, not to accidentily cast a fireball on eachother.

Two Become One is perfect for those who want a real challenge with their friends, while also making wholesome and important memories along the way. Have those late night talks where you jump around on your chests. Go out and explore the world and make it your own. The world you create here will one day come to a close, but your story will live on, stronger, bolder, and deeper than ever before.
